scenarios.title: Capture-as-fallback persists the prompt when the client disconnects mid-turn
evidenceRefs: internal/assistant/httpadapter/adapter.go (HTTPAdapter.ServeHTTP capture-as-fallback branch — the fix site)
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: capture invoked exactly once with a non-cancelled context under client disconnect; prompt text + user id preserved — Scenario 'BUG-069-002-SCN-001 Capture-as-fallback persists the prompt when the client disconnects mid-turn'.

scenarios.title: Adversarial — the regression FAILS against r.Context() and PASSES after context.WithoutCancel
evidenceRefs: report.md (GREEN run captured after context.WithoutCancel swap)
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: pre-fix RED proof + post-fix GREEN proof; adversarial-signal guard green — Scenario 'BUG-069-002-SCN-002 Adversarial — the regression FAILS against r.Context() and PASSES after context.WithoutCancel'.
